note: Bug-fix release. No schema change and no scoring/ranking change. Three body-only function changes: (F1) traverse_temporal_window include_unverified parsed via ::BOOLEAN instead of string-compare (accepts on/true/1/yes); (F2) recall_lessons and recall_hybrid emit RAISE NOTICE when 0 rows returned and ghost lessons exist in scope (COUNT-only, does not affect results); (F3) docs: connection-pool footgun documented in SQL_REFERENCE.md. Recall@k carries forward from v0.8.1 unchanged.
verification: Operator to run: pg_regress suite + ALTER EXTENSION UPDATE TO '0.8.2' upgrade path. Expected: all regress tests pass; NOTICE fires on 0-row recall with ghost lessons; traverse_temporal_window honors include_unverified='true'.
